title: EVENT! SWISSPACK TWIST 54" Long Handled Dustpan and Brush, Broom and Dustpan Set, Household Dust pan Combo, Long Handle for Indoor Outdoor Household Cleaning and Sweeping Green
features: Broom and dustpan set was designed with great convenience. Made from high quality ABS material and plastic construction, it can be used as a kitchen, home, office or lobby broom and dustpan combo.
We designed a soft, feathered texture that effectively grabs dust and dirt.
Lightweight painted aluminum pole can be extended to 54” in length, allow you to stand upright for comfortable and easy sweeping. Both broom and dustpan length can also be adjusted.
Dustpan locks in open position for easy emptying and features teeth to comb out dirt and dust from broom bristles.
We’re grateful for the opportunity to learn from your experience, and we’ll make it better.
description: SWISSPACK Long Handled Dustpan and Brush, Broom and Dustpan Set, Household Dust pan Combo with 54 Inch Handle for Indoor Outdoor Household Cleaning and Sweeping
